<div class="wp-block-vk-blocks-spacer vk_spacer"><div class="vk_spacer-display-pc" style="height:40px"></div><div class="vk_spacer-display-tablet" style="height:30px"></div><div class="vk_spacer-display-mobile" style="height:20px"></div></div>

<div class="wp-block-group width-fullcont sec03 is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow"><div class="wp-block-group__inner-container">
<div class="wp-block-group width-fullcont cont-width sec02 is-layout-flow wp-block-group-is-layout-flow"><div class="wp-block-group__inner-container">
<div class="wp-block-vk-blocks-spacer vk_spacer"><div class="vk_spacer-display-pc" style="height:100px"></div><div class="vk_spacer-display-tablet" style="height:80px"></div><div class="vk_spacer-display-mobile" style="height:60px"></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-columns cont_column animate col_animation is-layout-flex wp-container-4 wp-block-columns-is-layout-flex">
<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<h2 class="has-text-align-right separate-text animate wp-block-heading">わくわくする<br>モノづくりを<br>追求</h2>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-column is-layout-flow wp-block-column-is-layout-flow">
<p>私たちの強みは、約100年にわたりコツコツ積み上げてきた実績と、図面さえあれば、どんな製品でも作ることができる技術力。</p>



<div class="wp-block-vk-blocks-spacer vk_spacer"><div class="vk_spacer-display-pc" style="height:1em"></div><div class="vk_spacer-display-tablet" style="height:1em"></div><div class="vk_spacer-display-mobile" style="height:1em"></div></div>



<p>現在、売上の約60％を鉄道関連の製品で占めていますが、今後は大型のボルトやねじ、チタンなどの非鉄金属製品を強化することで、第二、第三の柱となる事業を育成。</p>



<div class="wp-block-vk-blocks-spacer vk_spacer"><div class="vk_spacer-display-pc" style="height:1em"></div><div class="vk_spacer-display-tablet" style="height:1em"></div><div class="vk_spacer-display-mobile" style="height:1em"></div></div>



<p>安定した経営基盤を確立することで、わくわくするモノづくりを追及していきます。</p>
</div>
</div>



<div class="wp-block-vk-blocks-spacer vk_spacer"><div class="vk_spacer-display-pc" style="height:100px"></div><div class="vk_spacer-display-tablet" style="height:80px"></div><div class="vk_spacer-display-mobile" style="height:60px"></div></div>
</div></div>

<script>//スマホ閲覧時にhoverを無効にする
	var touch = 'ontouchstart' in document.documentElement
            || navigator.maxTouchPoints > 0
            || navigator.msMaxTouchPoints > 0;
	if (touch) { // remove all :hover stylesheets
		try { // prevent exception on browsers not supporting DOM styleSheets properly
			for (var si in document.styleSheets) {
				var styleSheet = document.styleSheets[si];
				if (!styleSheet.rules) continue;
				for (var ri = styleSheet.rules.length - 1; ri >= 0; ri--) {
					if (!styleSheet.rules[ri].selectorText) continue;
					if (styleSheet.rules[ri].selectorText.match(':hover')) {
						styleSheet.deleteRule(ri);
					}
				}
			}
    
		} catch (ex) {}
	}
</script>
<script>
/* separate text */
	jQuery(function($){
		$('.separate-text,.page-header-title').children().addBack().contents().each(function(){
			if (this.nodeType == 3) {
				var $this = $(this);
				$this.replaceWith($this.text().replace(/(\S)/g, '<span class="separate-text-child">$&</span>'));
			}
		});
	});
</script>
<script>
	jQuery(function($){
		$('.page-header-title').addClass('separate-text animate')
	});
</script>
